thought.text: So this is super-tight. The variance from 88-100 may just be measurement noise. Let me run scoring a few times to see stability:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 1 2 3; do cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep "总分" | head -1; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && for i in 1 2 3; do cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep \"\u603b\u5206\" | head -1; done", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Check stability", "timeout": 1800}
